name: Spectrum Care Milk Powder For Dogs 150g
description: It is produced for Puppies separated from their mother at an early age. It is powdered milk feed that helps meet the needs of orphans. Recommended for puppies from 1 to 90 days old. Vitamin, mineral and protein amounts in it are suitable to be used as complementary feed during pregnancy and lactation period. It can also be used instead of breast milk for the protein, vitamin, mineral and fat needs of early puppies. Key Benefits : Nutrient-Rich Formula : Packed with a balanced blend of essential vitamins (A, D, E, B complex), minerals (calcium, phosphorus), and taurine, ensuring optimal growth and development for puppies. Supports Mother Dogs : Helps nursing mother dogs maintain their energy levels and health during lactation, aiding in milk production and overall recovery after childbirth. Taurine Enriched : Taurine is vital for the healthy development of a puppy's heart, eyes, and brain, ensuring they grow into strong, active dogs. Supports Immune Health : The vitamins and minerals in this formula help to strengthen the immune system of both puppies and mothers, promoting resistance to illness. Easily Digestible : This milk powder is designed for easy digestion, making it a perfect choice for puppies transitioning from mother's milk or for mothers needing extra support. Ideal for Weaning and Supplementation : Ideal for weaning puppies or supplementing the diet of mother dogs in need of additional nutrition during lactation. Inactive Ingredient Milk Powder, Whey Protein, Starch, Fructo Oligo Saccharide, Rice Flour. Nutrient components Protein 10.60% Fat Content 4.90% Crude Fiber 3% Crude Ash 4.30% Moisture 9.90% Packaging : Available in convenient resealable bags or cans to maintain freshness and ensure proper storage. Suitable For : All breeds of puppies and nursing mother dogs, especially those in need of extra nutritional support during growth or lactation. Caution : Always provide fresh water along with the milk powder. Consult with a veterinarian before use, especially if your dog has a medical condition or is on medication. Nutritional Recommendations and warnings 100 ml. add 2 full of medical spoon Milk Powder for Cats to (half a glass of water) warm water and consume after it is fully mixed. You can use it by preparing a new mixture every 4 hours. Each prepared mixture should be consumed within 45 minutes
